name: Es Caló Blanc
description: A tiny cove, barely a few metres wide, tucked between the rocks and counted among the smallest on the island; a curious, little-known spot for a brief stop. It sits by the residential area of Cap d'en Font (Sant Lluís), with an unpaved car park nearby and a staircase down to the sand on the western side; rocky surroundings, not step-free.

highlights: looking out over one of the tiniest coves on the island
a quick dip among the rocks in a curious little spot
combining it with Binibèquer or Binidalí, which are right next door
